# interface()

**Instance Method**

Returns the default Wi-Fi interface.

## Declaration

```swift
func interface() -> CWInterface?
```

## Return Value

The [doc://com.apple.corewlan/documentation/CoreWLAN/CWInterface] object that represents the default Wi-Fi interface.

## Getting Interfaces

- **interface(withName:)**: Returns the Wi-Fi interface with the given name.
- **interfaces()**: Returns all available Wi-Fi interfaces.
- **interfaceNames()**: Returns the list of the names of available Wi-Fi interfaces.

items.description: Returns the Wi-Fi interface with the given name.
items.name: interface(withName:)
